creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 205296
1.4.0

Hi Mark,

The attached patch updates acts to v1.4.0. It also spruces up the Makefile a bit (fixes some typos, adds LICENSE and NO_ARCH, etc.).

Per an email I sent to you a little bit ago, I've taken over upstream development of acts. Though it isn't included in the patch, I'd like to request maintainership of this port if you're open to it.
